name: Countdown Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add turkey, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until the turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in corn, hash brown potatoes, milk, salt, and black pepper.
6. Bake, covered, for 30 minutes or until heated through.
7. Top with cheddar cheese.
8. Bake for 3 more minutes or until cheese has melted.
